service_line_config.name: react
service_line_config.tech_context: The frontend is built with React. Key considerations: - Component-based architecture with functional components and hooks - State management (React Context, Redux, Zustand, or similar) - Routing via React Router - API integration via fetch, Axios, or TanStack Query - Consistent styling approach (CSS Modules, Tailwind, Styled Components) - Build tooling: Vite or Next.js depending on SSR requirements - Testing with React Testing Library and Jest

artifact_overrides.architecture: Describe frontend architecture in React terms: - Component hierarchy and page structure - State management strategy and data flow - API integration layer (service classes or custom hooks) - Routing structure - Shared component library / design system - Error boundary strategy
artifact_overrides.task: Include React-specific tasks: - Project scaffolding and tooling setup - Shared component / design system development - Page-level component implementation - State management setup - API integration hooks/services - Unit and integration tests
